issues_identified.issue: Extraneous social media comments section (non-tutorial content artifact)
issues_identified.description: Screenshots of social media comments overlay appearing during tutorial, completely unrelated to microphone/audio tutorial content
Original audio had RMS peak of only 0.122, making speech difficult to hear

parameters.reason: Remove initial dead air and keep intro content

operations.reason: Removed 2.70s of initial black/silence, kept intro segment with creator explaining concepts

parameters.reason: Remove extraneous content, keep main tutorial and clap demonstration

operations.reason: Skipped 6s of extraneous social media comments section (32-38s), kept main tutorial content including clap demonstration at ~51s
Normalized audio to standard speech loudness (-16 LUFS) without clipping or distortion

content_preserved: Creator introduction and setup explanation (2.70s - 32.00s in original)
Clap demonstration and explanation of why creators clap before takes (38.00s - ~52s in original)
Main tutorial content about microphone and audio recording techniques
Audio editing software demonstration with waveform visualization
content_removed: Social media comments screenshot overlay (32-38s) - non-tutorial artifact
checks_performed: ffprobe metadata inspection of source video
Visual frame sampling (102 frames at 1 fps) to identify content and artifacts
Audio RMS energy analysis to detect silence and identify content segments
Identification of extraneous content through frame inspection
ffprobe validation of output.mp4 for codec compliance
Verification of 1280x720 resolution and 16:9 aspect ratio
Verification of 30 fps frame rate (within 24-30 fps requirement)
Verification of output duration within 88-98 second target (actual: 91.90s)
